subcodes.first_line: O ye loved ones of God and handmaids of the Merciful! Your letter hath been received. Every word and thought expressed was indicative of your spiritual susceptibilities.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و اماء رحمن نامه شما رسید جمیع الفاظ و معانی احساسات وجدانی بود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
